ops.body: Criterion 9b9d2b8's remainder (cross-team reject fixture, PID-reuse/fork-exec trust tests) is Wave 4 scope by user priority — tracked in db24393 + daemonkit note ae67609. P2 stays open pending that wave; fail-closed-no-verifier tests landed in v0.1.0 (trust/verify_unsigned_test.go, verify_other_test.go).
